cover.subtitle:
통리기무아문과 영남만인소,
같은 해 두 길이 갈렸다.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration. ONE late-19th-century Korean young official in dark blue dopo robe and small black gat, holding an open Western-bound book and a brush, standing inside a tile-roofed government office (통리기무아문 reference). On the wall behind him: a folded map of Asia. Through the open paper-window: a misty courtyard with a row of Korean elders in white dopo holding rolled scrolls (위정척사 sangsoga reference). Color: dark blue-gray + ink-black + faint crimson sash. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 통리기무아문 설치. 개화 정책 총괄, 12사 운영.
별기군 창설. 일본인 교관, 신식 군대 훈련.

items.name: 김윤식
items.desc: 1881 청에 파견, 무기 제조 기술 습득.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 사절단 4종(수신사·조사시찰단·영선사·보빙사)의 파견 시기·국가·인솔자 구분, 위정척사 운동의 1860/70/80년대 주장 변화가 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized small black Korean gat (traditional hat) overlapping a folded Western-style map. RIGHT: a small ink brush silhouette suggesting a memorial scroll (만인소). Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent + faint teal #0D9488 line. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
